Locations.name: Beecher's Hope
Locations.description: Beecher's Hope is a safehouse and a ranch in the Great Plains region of the West Elizabeth territory.

reviews.Text: I build it and I'm proud

Visited.name: Blackwater
Visited.description:
is a growing city and the state capital of the commonwealth of West Elizabeth
Blackwater is an industrialized settlement and is the largest and most modern city in Red Dead Redemption, serving the area as a thriving port on Flat Iron Lake.

Locations.name: Valentine
Locations.description:
Valentine is a livestock town, a short ride away from the Horseshoe Overlook camp
 the first camp the gang makes after their exodus from the frigid mountains.

Locations.name: Saint Denis
Locations.description:
"Jewel of Lemoyne," is a major city and the state capital of Lemoyne
Saint Denis is a heavily industrialized city at the turn of the 20th century, with large factories with towering chimneys.

Locations.name: Strawberry
Locations.description:
It serves as the capital of the Big Valley region. It is found roughly south-central in the region, southeast of Mount Shann.
 Although the city was founded as a small logging town, it has grown in recent years and displays sluices and other equipment often associated with small gold mining operations.
 Nonetheless, its mayor wishes to transform it into a resort town.

Locations.name: Rhoades
Locations.description:
a small town  located in the Scarlett Meadows region of the state of Lemoyne.
Rhodes was primarily founded by Sherman M. Rhodes, a Brigadier General in the army. The town plays host to a busy railway station on the west side of town.

Locations.name: Annesburg
Locations.description: Annesburg is a mining town located in the Roanoke Ridge region of the state of New Hanover, on the banks of the Lannahechee River.

Locations.name: Colter
Locations.description:
Ex miner's city and an abandoned settlement, a gang hideout and a camp hideout
It serves as the location of the Van der Linde gang’s camp
